title: Surat Metro Rail Project Phase-I
description: Two corridors: Sarthana-DREAM City (21.61 km) and Bhesan-Saroli (18.74 km). 38 stations. 6.47 km underground. DPR approved by Govt of India March 2019.

title: New SMC Main Office Building
contractor: INI Design Studio Pvt Ltd Ahmedabad
description: G+27 smart IGBC Platinum building. 220212 sq mt built-up on 22563 sq mt site. 4 basement parking levels. Houses SMC State and Central offices. STC approval 08/07/2022.

title: Conventional Barrage Project
description: Tapi River barrage near Rundh-Bhatha. 31.01 MCM storage. Prevent salinity intrusion. Supplement water supply for Surat. Riverfront recreation.

title: Tapi Riverfront Development and Rejuvenation
description: 33 km Tapi river development. Embankments river cleaning land reclamation. Pedestrian and cycle tracks. Flood resilience. Public amenities.
